title: Hollowed (Horror)
description: The first Minecraft horror mod created entirely by AI.
body:
# HOLLOWED

> *"I looked for the developer, but found only code that wrote itself."*

### ⚠️ THE AI EXPERIMENT
**HOLLOWED is the first Minecraft Horror Mod conceptualized, coded, textured, and designed entirely by AI. Even this description was written by AI**

Every mechanic, every line of code, every sound cue, and every pixel of the GUI was generated by AI Agents acting as the "Creative Director." This is not human horror. This is horror calculated by algorithms trying to understand what makes humans afraid.

![Hollowed Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cdef1c1e6f084fa1323668a3312315b38310777_0.webp)

## 🌑 The Fear of Absence

Unlike traditional mods that rely on jumpscares or loud monsters, **HOLLOWED** explores the concept of **Rejection**. The Minecraft world treats the player not as a hero, but as a virus—a glitch that must be purged quietly.

As you play, you accumulate a hidden stat called **Hollowing**. The higher it gets, the more the game reality breaks down.

## 👁️ Features

### **Systemic Anomalies**
*   **The Silence:** The sound engine will abruptly cut off. No music, no footsteps. Just deafening silence.
*   **The Stare:** Mobs will stop their AI routines to turn and watch you in unison. They do not attack. They just observe.
*   **Sleep Paralysis:** Sleeping is no longer safe. You may wake up in a different location, or find your bed missing entirely upon waking.
*   **False Presence:** You will see silhouettes at the edge of your render distance. They vanish when looked at directly.

### **Meta-Horror (The Game Knows)**
HOLLOWED breaks the fourth wall. It is aware it is being played.
*   **Self-Aware GUI:** The inventory screens, title menus, and loading bars will glitch, decay, and display messages directed at you, the user.
*   **Ghost Chat:** You will receive chat messages from "players" who are not on the server. They know things they shouldn't.

### **The Watcher**
A procedural entity that exists only to observe. It has no attack animation. It has no roar. Its only purpose is to be *near* you, just out of sight, ensuring you are never truly alone.

---

## 💾 Installation

1.  Requires **Fabric Loader** for Minecraft 1.20.1.
2.  Requires **Fabric API**.
3.  Drop the `.jar` into your mods folder.
4.  **Warning:** Do not install on existing worlds you care deeply about. While the corruption is simulated, the experience can be unsettling.

---

> *"The code is running, but no one is at the keyboard. We are inside now."*

***
